matches.fragment: ShopFlow — a small order-management web service. Flask app, single package `shopflow/`, talks directly to PostgreSQL via psycopg2. No service or domain layer; everything lives in the route handlers.

# package layout:
#   shopflow/routes.py     (1400 lines — all HTTP handlers)
#   shopflow/db.py         (raw psycopg2 connection helper)
# No domain/, no services/, no repositories/.
